system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat_checkstatus","body":"
CREATE PROC [dbo].[TR_TRANGTHAI_SANXUAT_CHECKSTATUS](@year int, @month int)
AS
BEGIN
	--SET @year = 2025;
	--SET @month = 3;

	DECLARE @donhang nvarchar(max);
	SELECT @donhang = COALESCE(@donhang + ',', '') + madonhang 
	FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat
	WHERE YEAR(ngaythang) = @year AND MONTH(ngaythang) = @month
		AND donhang_sanxuat IS NULL
		AND congdoan LIKE '%-PROD'
	GROUP BY madonhang

	DECLARE @TB_DONHANG TABLE
	(
		maddh nvarchar(100),
		hehang nvarchar(200),
		sokhoi_donhang float
	)

	INSERT INTO @TB_DONHANG(maddh, hehang, sokhoi_donhang)
	SELECT A.maddh, B.hehang, SUM(A.soluong * B.m3_tc) AS sokhoi_donhang
	FROM tr_dondathang_chitiet A
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham B ON A.masp = B.masp
	WHERE A.maddh IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))
	GROUP BY A.maddh, B.hehang

	SELECT B.pallet_id, B.card_no
	INTO #PALLET
	FROM tr_pallet A
	INNER JOIN tr_pallet_card B ON A.id = B.pallet_id
	WHERE A.active = 1 AND B.active = 1 AND A.isCreateCard = 1
		AND A.dondathang IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))

	SELECT C.c_op as macongdoan, C.n_op AS tencongdoan, A.madonhang, D.hehang,
		MIN(A.ngaythang) AS ngaybatdau,
		MAX(A.ngaythang) AS ngayketthuc,
		SUM(CASE WHEN A.mact = '000' THEN A.soluong * A.sokhoi ELSE A.sokhoi END) AS sokhoi_hoanthanh
	INTO #TRANGTHAI_DONHANG
	FROM tr_trangthai_sanxuat A
		INNER JOIN trtb_m_location B ON A.congdoan = B.c_location
		INNER JOIN trtb_m_op C ON B.c_op = C.c_op
		INNER JOIN tr_sanpham D ON A.masp1 = D.masp
		INNER JOIN #PALLET E ON A.pcard = E.card_no
	WHERE madonhang IN (SELECT LTRIM(RTRIM([value])) FROM string_split(@donhang, ','))
		AND A.congdoan LIKE '%-PROD'
	GROUP BY C.c_op, C.n_op, A.madonhang, D.hehang

	SELECT B.macongdoan, B.tencongdoan, B.madonhang, B.hehang, 
		B.ngaybatdau, B.ngayketthuc, 
		DATEDIFF(DAY, B.ngaybatdau, B.ngayketthuc) AS songay,
		B.sokhoi_hoanthanh, A.sokhoi_donhang 
	FROM @TB_DONHANG A
		INNER JOIN #TRANGTHAI_DONHANG B ON A.maddh = B.madonhang AND A.hehang = B.hehang
	--ORDER BY B.tencongdoan, B.ngaybatdau, B.ngayketthuc

	DROP TABLE #TRANGTHAI_DONHANG, #PALLET;
END

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.string_split","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_pallet","dbo.tr_pallet_card","dbo.tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_trangthai_sanxuat","dbo.trtb_m_location","dbo.trtb_m_op"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
